About Me

Who is Muhammad Awais?

I'm a Computer Science graduate from Sialkot, Pakistan, with a CGPA of 3.6/4.0 and a deep passion for building AI-powered products that solve real problems.

Unlike most graduates who rely on pre-built tools, I've built AI systems entirely from the ground up — collecting 18,000+ agricultural images in the field, training 5 CNN architectures, implementing Graph Neural Networks for cybersecurity, and shipping full mobile apps end-to-end.

"I don't just study AI — I build it, test it in the real world, and ship it to users."

My stack spans the full journey: from raw data collection to model training, FastAPI backends, React Native frontends, and cloud deployment.

Featured Projects

Not tutorials. Not clones. Real AI systems built from scratch and deployed.

Project 01 — FYP · Agriculture AI
LeafDoc
AI-Powered Smart Agriculture Ecosystem
A complete mobile AI platform built on a custom dataset of 18,000+ real field images — collected and labeled from scratch. Benchmarked 5 CNN architectures, deployed ConvNeXt-Tiny with Explainable AI via Grad-CAM. Includes AI farming chatbot, live weather advisory, fertilizer & pesticide calculators, and disease alerts.
29 Disease Classes18K+ Images97.8% ConfidenceSupabase Hosted
React NativeFastAPIPyTorchConvNeXtGrad-CAMExpo EASSupabase
📱 Live Screenshots GitHub ↗
Project 02 — FYP · Cybersecurity AI
CyberGuard
Graph Neural Network Malware Detection Engine
Advanced Android malware detector using GraphSAGE GNN — treats every APK as a mathematical graph with 470 extracted behavioral features. Detects malware regardless of obfuscation techniques. Integrated LLaMA 3.3 70B for AI-powered threat explanations. Includes live threat news feed and exportable PDF security reports.
470 APK FeaturesGraphSAGE GNNLLaMA 3.3 70BLive Threat Feed
React NativeFastAPIPyTorch GeometricGraphSAGEAndroguardGroq APISQLite
